recommendations.title: Rape Zombie: Lust of the Dead

recommendations.title: The Oath
recommendations.overview: In a politically-divided United States, a man struggles to make it through the Thanksgiving holiday without destroying his family.

recommendations.title: Ravenous
recommendations.overview: In an isolated rural community of Quebec, Canada, some inhabitants attack other people, hungry for human flesh. A few survivors gather and go deep into the forest to escape them.

recommendations.title: The Video Dead
recommendations.overview: On a quiet, tree-lined street, an old television set receives a single channel that repeats the same horror film over and over, freeing zombies from the grave to kill.

recommendations.title: The Rezort
recommendations.overview: The ReZort, a post apocalyptic safari, offers paying guests the opportunity to kill zombies in the wake of an outbreak.

recommendations.title: Rape Zombie: Lust of the Dead 2
recommendations.overview: A strange virus turns 90% of the world population into Lust eating Zombies. However, in Akihabara, Japan, some males were found to be uninfected. These men team up with the Zombies to go after the flesh and blood of surviving young women to fill thei

recommendations.title: WΔZ
recommendations.overview: There is something horribly wrong with the bodies found in the dark city streets. Some are mutilated while others have the Price equation (wΔz = Cov (w,z) = βwzVz) carved into their flesh. Detective Eddie Argo and his new partner Helen Westcott unear

recommendations.title: Dawn of the Dead
recommendations.overview: A group of survivors take refuge in a shopping mall after the world is taken over by aggressive, flesh-eating zombies.

recommendations.title: Bad Milo!
recommendations.overview: A horror comedy centered on a guy who learns that his unusual stomach problems are being caused by a demon living in his intestines.

recommendations.title: The Day the Earth Caught Fire
